ddls:
CREATE TABLE "spectra" (
  "spectrum_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each spectrum */,
  "wavelength" REAL /* Wavelength at which measurements were taken */,
  "s11a" REAL /* Amplitude measurement for S11 (A) */,
  "s11m" REAL /* Magnitude measurement for S11 (M) */,
  "s21a" REAL /* Amplitude measurement for S21 (A) */,
  "s21m" REAL /* Magnitude measurement for S21 (M) */,
  "s22m" REAL /* Magnitude measurement for S22 (M) */,
  "s22a" REAL /* Amplitude measurement for S22 (A) */,
  "s12m" REAL /* Magnitude measurement for S12 (M) */,
  "s12a" REAL /* Amplitude measurement for S12 (A) */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement method */,
  "acquisition_time" TEXT /* Time when the spectrum was acquired */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature at which the measurement was taken */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Pressure at which the measurement was taken */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity at which the measurement was taken */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the spectrum */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spectrum_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spectra_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spectra_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spectra_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurement_methods ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "date_conducted" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was conducted */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "lead_researcher" INTEGER /* ID of the lead researcher */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the experiment */,
  "project_code" TEXT /* Code or identifier for the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the experiment */,
  "equipment_used" TEXT /* Details of the equipment used in the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_lead_researcher FOREIGN KEY ("lead_researcher") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "samples" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sample */,
  "sample_name" TEXT /* Name of the sample */,
  "material_type" TEXT /* Type of material (e.g., glass, polymer) */,
  "thickness" REAL /* Thickness of the sample in mm */,
  "preparation_method" TEXT /* Preparation method used for the sample */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the sample */,
  "batch_number" TEXT /* Batch number of the sample */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Expiry date of the sample */,
  "storage_conditions" TEXT /* Storage conditions for the sample */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the sample */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the measurement method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the method */,
  "equipment" TEXT /* Equipment used for the measurement method */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date when the equipment was last calibrated */,
  "resolution" REAL /* Resolution of the measurement method */,
  "sensitivity" REAL /* Sensitivity of the measurement method */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the data file was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, technician, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Date and time of the last activity */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "spectrum_id" INTEGER /* ID of the spectrum being accessed */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_spectrum_id FOREIGN KEY ("spectrum_id") REFERENCES spectra ("spectrum_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_samples" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample being used in the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id", "sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "spectrum_measurement_methods" (
  "spectrum_id" INTEGER /* ID of the spectrum */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement method used for the spectrum */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spectrum_id", "method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_management" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata record */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the metadata */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the data (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the metadata was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the metadata */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the metadata */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the metadata */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_management_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_management_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_management_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)
